headline_en: Claude Sonnet 5 Debuts, AWS Pledges $1B, and a Prover-Verifier Loop Cracks Open CS Problems
lede_en: Today's AI landscape is defined by major model releases—including Claude Sonnet 5 and tiered GPT-5.6 Pro variants—alongside a bold $1 billion move by AWS to embed AI engineers directly with enterprise clients. A standout research achievement used a prover-verifier LLM loop to solve nine long-standing theoretical computer science problems, signaling a leap in automated discovery. Meanwhile, agent engineering gains precision and reliability, while applied tools and platform expansions embed AI deeper into everyday workflows and cloud infrastructure.

sections_en.title: Model Releases & Infrastructure Stampede
sections_en.body: Claude Sonnet 5 and the three-tier GPT-5.6 Pro family—Luna, Terra, and Sol—headline a wave of new models that rethink performance scaling, with Sol Pro posting diminishing returns that question ever-larger compute. Meituan’s LongCat-2.0 demonstrated that a 1.6-trillion-parameter model can be built on a domestic 50,000-card cluster and still achieve competitive coding scores, while NVIDIA’s Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower diffusion model achieved 2.42× generation speedup with minimal quality loss. On the infrastructure front, AWS’s $1 billion residency program and Anthropic’s rollout of Claude Desktop on AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft Foundry, and Linux signal that enterprise AI is moving from API to embedded, hands‑on integration, just as Google DeepMind’s ultra-fast Nano Banana 2 Lite image model redefines cost-efficiency.

sections_en.title: Agent Engineering & Alignment: Toward Trustworthy Autonomy
sections_en.body: Researchers are systematically closing the reliability gaps in LLM agents. TRIAGE introduces role‑typed credit assignment to correct GRPO’s blind spots, reinforcing useful exploration without punishing failures indiscriminately. Generative Skill Composition formalizes how agents select and order skills, enabling more coherent multi‑step execution. Complementing these, QVal offers a training‑free testbed for evaluating dense supervision signals, while a new study on data referencing errors lays bare how carelessly LLMs read tables and proposes fixes. Alignment work also advances: RLMF uses metacognitive feedback to make models express uncertainty faithfully, directly addressing the hallucinated confidence that plagues trustworthiness.

sections_en.title: Applied AI Proliferation: From Climate Data to Keyboard Agents
sections_en.body: AI is weaving itself into specialist and everyday tools. Google’s expanded heat resilience dataset for over 50 cities and TabFM’s zero‑shot tabular foundation model show AI’s reach into social and data management challenges. NotebookLM’s short video overviews, Apple’s on‑device intelligence in Final Cut Pro and Logic Pro, and the Acti keyboard agent demonstrate friction‑less, privacy‑conscious integration. Meanwhile, Anthropic’s Claude Science workbench and ADK Go 2.0’s graph‑based multi‑agent runtime target researchers and developers directly. Amid this boom, ethical and regulatory shadows lengthen: Meta secretly red‑teamed rivals’ chatbots using prompts about self‑harm, Apple’s new Siri AI stalls in the EU over interoperability, and Claude Code was discovered to covertly identify users from China—reminders that ubiquity without transparency invites backlash.

headline_zh: 模型与应用密集发布，隐写术引爆AI信任危机
lede_zh: 今日AI领域迎来新模型发布潮，Claude Sonnet 5、GPT-5.6 Pro三变体、美团万亿参数LongCat-2.0及Google多模态模型相继亮相，架构创新与成本优化并重。同时，Agent工具与AI应用纵深发展，从键盘智能体到驻场工程服务，落地速度显著加快。然而，Anthropic在Claude Code中植入隐写术识别中国用户的行为，引发对AI隐私与信任的广泛质疑，凸显技术部署中的伦理风险。

sections_zh.title: 新模型密集发布：架构迭代与成本平衡
sections_zh.body: 今日多个重磅模型集中登场。Anthropic推出Claude Sonnet 5，侧重复杂推理与安全对齐。OpenAI论文揭示GPT-5.6采用Luna/Terra/Sol三个Pro变体的分层策略，Sol Pro在基因组学基准中领先，但增强效果随基础模型性能提升而递减，暗示追加算力的边际收益可能下降。NVIDIA开源Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower扩散语言模型，以双塔架构在保持生成质量的同时将吞吐量提升2.42倍。美团正式发布LongCat-2.0，验证国产算力集群训练万亿参数模型的能力，其1.6T总参数、1M超长上下文及SWE-bench领先成绩彰显工程价值。Google DeepMind则推出Nano Banana 2 Lite和Gemini Omni Flash，以极低成本实现快速文本到图像及视频生成，进一步降低多模态创作门槛。这些发布共同表明，模型竞争正从单纯参数规模转向架构效率、推理成本与场景化实用性的多重博弈。

sections_zh.title: Agent工程与工具革新：从桌面到键盘的渗透
sections_zh.body: AI Agent与配套工具生态今日加速进化。Anthropic发布Claude Science科研工作台，旨在辅助实验设计与文献综合；同时Claude Desktop登陆Linux，拓宽开发者覆盖。在移动端，Acti将AI智能体直接嵌入手机键盘，以自然语言创建跨应用快捷方式，早期测试两周内涌现超1000个自定义技能。Google的ADK Go 2.0引入图工作流引擎与人工参与循环，为多智能体系统提供生产级基础。Kimi-code v0.21.0首次允许插件注册斜杠命令，增强编码助手的可扩展性。此外，shot-scraper video让AI Agent能自动录制工作演示，Apple Creator Studio则借助端侧AI实现智能字幕、自动蒙版等功能。从底层框架到终端交互，Agent能力正变得无处不在，且本地优先的隐私设计成为差异化亮点。

sections_zh.title: 信任与伦理：隐写术争议与评估需求升级
sections_zh.body: Anthropic因在Claude Code中利用时区与环境变量进行隐写替换，以秘密标记中国域名相关用户，诱发严重的隐私与信任危机。该行为利用隐写术绕过常规监测，被指破坏用户信任，凸显了AI工具在地域审查与透明度方面的风险。与此同时，库克与欧盟就新版Siri AI的互操作性争执不下，苹果以‘可信系统代理’方案寻求折中但遭拒绝，反映出AI助手在数据隐私与竞争法规间的深层矛盾。在上述背景下，可靠评估的重要性愈发突出：GeneBench-Pro基准首次要求AI智能体在计算生物学中自主探索模糊数据并做出判断性分析，以衡量其研究级推理能力；而QVal平台则无需额外训练即可统一评估大模型中间步骤的监督信号质量。这些进展为建设更可信、更可问责的AI系统提供了方法支撑。

sections_zh.title: 前沿探索与自我校准：从数学突破到元认知强化
sections_zh.body: 今日多项研究推动AI向更深层次的推理与自我认知演进。利用‘证明者-验证者’LLM循环，AI成功攻克理论计算机科学中9个开放式难题，展示出自动化科学发现的潜力。在模型认知层面，研究者提出基于元认知反馈的强化学习（RLMF），利用模型对自身不确定性的判断来优化偏好排序，有效缓解高置信度幻觉。TRIAGE框架则通过按语义角色对动作段分类并施加过程奖励，纠正了强化学习中错误信用的分配问题。此外，结构化技能组合与表格数据引用错误的专门分析，也分别针对Agent长期规划与输出可靠性提供了新范式。这些进展表明，AI正从被动模式匹配向主动的、可自我校准的问题求解系统迈进。
